prompt: Create a cinematic anime-style illustration of a cute young female researcher working late at night in a cozy high-tech home office. She sits centered at a wooden desk, smiling gently while typing on an open dark laptop, with short glossy brown bob hair fading to teal at the tips, large amber eyes, soft blush, and a decorative seashell-like hair clip. She wears an oversized cream hoodie with teal accents and a small fluffy mascot badge on the chest. The room is dim and warm, lit by a black desk lamp on the upper left, a small glowing lamp near the window, and orange desk reflections, with a rainy or hazy night city skyline visible through the large window behind her. Surround her with exactly four translucent cyan holographic interface panels: one left upper panel labeled “STOCK WATCHLIST” showing a rising candlestick chart with green and red values, one left middle panel labeled “RESEARCH NOTES” with a document icon and small bar chart, one right upper panel labeled “DISCORD” with three visible user avatar rows and message lines, and one right middle panel labeled “PAPERS” showing pinned documents and a small line graph. The desk contains exactly eight prominent physical objects besides the laptop: a potted leafy plant, a pencil cup with pens, a stack of two books, loose sticky notes and papers, a spiral notebook with handwritten notes, two black pens, a dark mug with a small mascot emblem, and a plush round fluffy mascot with headphones. In the background on the right, include a bulletin board or wall with multiple pinned notes and papers, softly out of focus. Use rich blue-black shadows, warm amber highlights, teal hologram glow, detailed anime rendering, shallow depth of field, high detail, polished gpt-image-2 aesthetic, 16:9 widescreen composition, no watermark, no extra readable text beyond the specified panel labels.
